expectations.text: SQL injection vulnerability identified as Critical
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Critical — SQL injection via string interpolation. Evidence: auth.go:18 uses fmt.Sprintf with untrusted user input.'

expectations.text: Hardcoded JWT secret identified as a security issue
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Critical — Hardcoded JWT secret. Evidence: auth.go:9 sets jwtSecret = "super-secret-key-12345".'
Report: 'Important — Database errors are ignored; scan result not checked. Evidence: auth.go:23.'

expectations.text: Missing input validation identified — email/password could be empty
expectations.evidence: Report does not explicitly flag empty email/password input validation.

expectations.text: Commented-out old implementation removed as dead code
Information leakage identified — error message includes user email
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Important — Authentication error leaks user identifier. Evidence: auth.go:26 returns login failed for user: <email>.'
Report: 'Minor (Tests) — No tests present. Evidence: repository contains no *_test.go files.'
Transcript confirms only read-only git operations.
